title: Golden Grilled American Chicken Skewers
description: A smoky and light American dish featuring lemon zest and flambe, perfect for a quick fix, this recipe is egg-free-friendly and served on a bamboo tray.
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic powder, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken onto bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through.
Meanwhile, mix lemon zest and lemon juice in a small bowl.
After the skewers have grilled for 8 minutes, brush the lemon mixture onto the chicken.
Remove the skewers from the grill and place them on a heatproof bamboo tray.
Pour the rum over the skewers and carefully ignite the rum with a match or lighter to flambe.
Let the flames burn for 30 seconds to 1 minute, then extinguish and serve hot.
